$meta.name: Men's Wellness Centers Design Tokens
$meta.changelog: 1.2.1 (2026-05-31): Selected chip/control fill brightened from deep orange-800 #CA4A0E to BRIGHT orange-500 #FF6B2C (the deep fill read brown as a large solid block). Chip text flips from white to NAVY ink-900 to hold contrast (6.6:1 AA any size); white on #FF6B2C is banned (2.84:1). Selected chip now matches the primary button exactly. Checkbox checked-fill stays deep #CA4A0E because the white check glyph needs 4.67:1. | 1.2.0 (2026-05-31): Primary button is now the BRIGHT orange orange-500 #FF6B2C WITH glow, the brand's signature CTA. Critical: button text on bright orange is NAVY ink-900 #0B1029 (6.6:1 AA any size) — white text on #FF6B2C is only 2.84:1 and is banned on orange fills. Hover DEEPENS to orange-600 #F2630C (navy text 4.0:1, large/transient). Added a WHITE secondary CTA (white fill + navy text, 18.7:1) for dark/navy backgrounds. orange-800 #CA4A0E retained as a deeper button option and selected-chip fill (still pairs with white text). | 1.1.0: Hardened resting button to orange-800 #CA4A0E (white 4.67:1 AA any size); disabled -> navy-70; placeholder hint-only. | 1.0.0: Initial Sunset orange system (replaced brown).
$meta.description: Single source of truth for the Men's Wellness Centers visual system. All values are CANONICAL. Builders (human and AI) must reference token names, never raw values. To change a value, edit it here and regenerate tokens.css and the spec. Layer order: primitive -> semantic -> component. A token may only reference tokens in a layer below it.

decisionLog.navy: #0B1029 single canonical navy. #000033 and #0A0D29 retired. deep-navy #122256 = brighter alternate dark surface; near-black #0D0807 = max-contrast premium dark surface. Both logo-approved backgrounds.
decisionLog.orange: Sunset system, role-based (never reference by shade in components). PRIMARY/RESTING BUTTON = action token = orange-500 #FF6B2C WITH glow, the signature bright CTA. Button text on orange is ALWAYS navy ink-900 #0B1029 (6.6:1 AA any size); white text on orange is BANNED (2.84:1). HOVER deepens to orange-600 #F2630C (navy text 4.0:1, transient). orange-800 #CA4A0E = deeper button alt + checkbox checked-fill (pairs with white text/check, 4.67:1). Selected chip now uses bright #FF6B2C + navy text. ACCENT = orange-500 #FF6B2C (icons/dots/links-on-navy/glow). WHITE secondary CTA = white fill + navy text (18.7:1) on dark backgrounds. Replaces brown #B84A08/#A8430A/#E8670A.
decisionLog.type: Oswald display (uppercase), Montserrat marketing body, Inter app/form UI. Bebas Neue removed from all fallbacks.
decisionLog.input: White fill, 2px border, 8px radius, inline leading icon. One input style everywhere.
decisionLog.label: Uppercase, Inter 700, 11px, 0.88px tracking. One label style everywhere.
decisionLog.selectable: Selected = solid BRIGHT orange-500 #FF6B2C fill + NAVY ink-900 text (6.6:1 AA any size), identical to the primary button. White text on it is banned (2.84:1). Unselected = navy/bordered with orange-500 icon. Checkbox checked-fill stays deep orange-800 #CA4A0E so the white check glyph holds 4.67:1.
decisionLog.success: #5DD68A on dark. Replaces all teal. Teal banned.
decisionLog.a11y: WCAG 2.2 AA target. All key pairings verified.
decisionLog.noGray: No neutral grays anywhere. Muted text, borders, placeholders, and disabled states are derived from navy-900 or cream-50 at opacity steps. Pure white and pure black are not banned; only mid-tone neutral grays are.

navy-900.comment: Canonical Midnight Navy. Page background on dark screens.

navy-800.comment: Optional elevated dark surface ONLY where a second dark fill is unavoidable. Prefer border+shadow for elevation.

deep-navy.comment: Alternate brighter navy from logo system. Use as a richer dark surface or secondary dark hero where #0B1029 reads too flat. Logo-approved background. White text = 13.6:1 AAA.

near-black.comment: Max-contrast premium dark surface. Use sparingly for high-end editorial/dark framing and as a logo background. Warmer than pure black. White text = 19.9:1 AAA.

cream-50.comment: Warm off-white. Light page/card background and primary text on dark.

white.comment: Pure white. Input fills, light cards, text on dark.

ink-900.comment: Text on light/white surfaces (= navy-900 for unity).

cream-70.comment: Muted/secondary text on dark. NO GRAY. cream-50 at 70%. 8.4:1 on navy = AAA.

cream-55.comment: Subtle/caption text on dark. cream-50 at 55%.

navy-70.comment: Muted/secondary text on light. NO GRAY. navy-900 at 70%. 6.7:1 on cream = AA.

navy-55.comment: PLACEHOLDER HINT ONLY on white fields (4.15:1, placeholders WCAG-exempt). Never use for real informational text and never as the sole label — fields always carry a visible uppercase label above them.

navy-25.comment: Input border / subtle hairline on light. navy-900 at 25%. Decorative; focus ring carries a11y.

orange-800.comment: DEEP button alternate + checkbox checked-fill. Pairs with WHITE text/check 4.67:1 (AA any size). Use when an element must carry a white glyph/text. On navy 4.01:1.

orange-600.comment: Sunset Orange. PRIMARY-button HOVER (deepens from #FF6B2C). Pairs with NAVY text (4.0:1 large/transient). White text on it is banned (3.2:1).

orange-500.comment: Bright Coral. PRIMARY BUTTON FILL (with glow) + accent (icons/dots/links-on-navy/glow). Button/accent text on it is ALWAYS navy ink-900 (6.6:1 AA any size). WHITE text on it is BANNED (2.84:1).

orange-300.comment: Soft orange tint. Selected chip background tint / badges on light.

success-300.comment: Success on dark. Replaces teal everywhere.

cream-14.comment: Hairline border on dark. NO GRAY. cream at 14%.

cream-06.comment: Faint fill on dark (unselected chip). cream at 6%.

family-display.comment: Headlines, display, eyebrows. UPPERCASE by default. NO Bebas Neue.

family-marketing.comment: Marketing body copy on landing/content pages.

family-ui.comment: App, forms, buttons, labels, UI chrome.

md.comment: Buttons, inputs, selectable controls. CANONICAL control radius.

lg.comment: Cards, panels, modals. CANONICAL card radius.

card-dark.comment: Card on dark = same navy + border + shadow for elevation. No second fill.

selected.comment: Selected chip/control fill = bright #FF6B2C, identical to the primary button. Text on it = NAVY ink-900 (6.6:1 AA any size). White on it is banned (2.84:1).

on-action.comment: Text on the bright orange primary button = NAVY (6.6:1). White on #FF6B2C is banned (2.84:1).

on-action-deep.comment: Text on the DEEP orange-800 #CA4A0E button/chip = white (4.67:1).

primary-bg.comment: PRIMARY/RESTING button = bright #FF6B2C WITH glow. The signature CTA.

primary-bg-hover.comment: HOVER DEEPENS to #F2630C, glow stays. Navy text holds.

primary-fg.comment: Navy text on the bright orange button (6.6:1 AA any size). White is BANNED on orange (2.84:1).

primary-deep-bg.comment: DEEP button variant #CA4A0E for cases that need WHITE text (use primary-deep-fg). Optional.

primary-deep-fg.comment: White text on the deep orange-800 button (4.67:1).

secondary-bg.comment: WHITE secondary CTA on dark/navy backgrounds: white fill + navy text (18.7:1). Replaces the old navy-fill secondary.

secondary-fg.comment: Navy text on the white secondary CTA.

secondary-ghost-bg.comment: Tertiary ghost button on dark: transparent fill + cream-14 border + cream text.

disabled-fg.comment: Disabled label = navy-70. Reads as intentionally-off, not broken.

min-label-size.comment: HARD RULE: button labels never render below 16px bold. On bright #FF6B2C use navy text; on deep #CA4A0E use white text. Dense/secondary controls use white/navy, not orange fill.

states.disabled: background disabled-bg; color disabled-fg; no shadow; cursor not-allowed

button-secondary.comment: WHITE secondary CTA for dark/navy backgrounds. White fill + navy text (18.7:1).

states.hover: background -> cream-50 (subtle warm shift); navy text holds

button-ghost.comment: Tertiary action on dark only. Transparent fill, cream hairline border, cream text.

states.error: border -> input-error; helper text error-on-light below

selectable.comment: Unified component for location chips, date chips, time slots.

checkbox.comment: Checked fill uses DEEP orange-800 #CA4A0E so the white check mark holds 4.67:1. Not the bright #FF6B2C (white check would be 2.84:1).

badge-legitscript.comment: Required in every footer. Render as supplied SVG/PNG, do not recolor.

logo.comment: Men's WELLNESS CENTERS wordmark + notched 'M' bug. Single-fill marks, recolor only to an approved brand color. Never re-proportion, rotate, add effects, or place on a busy/low-contrast background.

approvedPairings.accent-orange-bug-on-near-black: 7.01:1 AA. Bug-only accent treatment (#FF6B2C). Not for the full wordmark.

logo.clearSpace: Minimum clear space on all sides equals the cap-height of the 'M' bug (1x the bug height). Keep all other elements outside this zone.
donts: No recolor to unapproved hues, gradients, or photos.
No stretch, skew, rotate, or re-spacing of letters.
No drop shadows, bevels, glows, or outlines on the mark.
No placement on a background that drops below 4.5:1 contrast.
No accent-orange on the full wordmark (orange is bug-accent only).
